description_long: This modern house features a two-story structure with a rooftop garden and lounge area, complete with planters and outdoor seating. The second level includes a partially covered swimming pool and a spacious terrace with dining furniture. A prominent spiral staircase on one side provides access from the ground to the upper levels. The exterior is finished in light gray brick, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The ground level includes a small balcony with potted plants and a green lawn area, while the entryway is flanked by manicured shrubs. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and contemporary architectural lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a rooftop garden, swimming pool, spiral staircase, and large glass windows, featuring open terraces and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the spiral staircase, large vertical windows, and the rooftop garden with planters and flowers.
description_view_1: This side shows the rooftop lounge area with outdoor seating, the pool, a small balcony with potted plants, and a sloped roof section.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the side wall with a single window, the edge of the rooftop garden, and a cluster of shrubs at the base.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main entryway with a stone path, flanked by tall shrubs, large glass windows, and the rooftop garden above.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a stone path, flanked by tall shrubs, with a simple door and no porch or overhang.
